description:
Comment "AI Agent" for your FREE Claude Code ToolKit & the breakdown video coming later today!

Claude isn’t inefficient by accident.

It scans files every time. High tokens, low context.

Graphify fixes this by turning your files into a persistent knowledge graph.

It connects your assets automatically, so Claude understands relationships instantly.

Less searching. More reasoning.

Result: smarter outputs, 70x fewer tokens.

#AItools
#ClaudeCode
#KnowledgeGraph
#Automation
#AIAgents
